testcases.input: s = "103301" Output: 2 Explanation: There are 6 possible subsequences of length 5: "10330","10331","10301","10301","13301","03301". Two of them (both equal to "10301") are palindromic.
testcases.expectedOutput: 2 Explanation: There are 6 possible subsequences of length 5: "10330","10331","10301","10301","13301","03301". Two of them (both equal to "10301") are palindromic.

testcases.input: s = "0000000" Output: 21 Explanation: All 21 subsequences are "00000", which is palindromic.
